{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Enforcer construct
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s [[Enforcer construct]] can work against mental attacks.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
